JOHN LEWIS - REPORTER: 10:50AM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, JEFF L. STROBEL APPEARING FOR PLTF, ERIC GARCIA APPEARING AS PRO PER DEFT, ROBERT BRAINARD APPEARING AS PRO PER DEFT. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD, TERMS AS FOLLOWS: MR. GARCIA HAS VACATED PREMISES AND CASE AGAINST HIM WILL BE DISMISSED W/PREJ. BY PLTF; BUT PLTF. RESERVES RIGHT TO BRING A SEPARATE DAMAGES ACTION, BUT AGREES POSSESSION IS NOT AN ISSUE. MR. BRAINARD MAY CONT. IN POSS. THROUGH 20-NOV-94, BUT IF DEFT. DOES NOT VACATE THE EVICTION PROCESS WILL BEGIN. PLTF. WILL WAIVE RENTS AND DAMAGES; EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS. PTLF. WILL PREPARE STIP AND SUBMIT TO COURT W/OUT MR. BRAYNARD'S SIGNATURE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAINARD, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1434 SOUTH VAN NESS AVE., STAYED UNTIL NOV-20-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PARTIES AGREE ERIK GARCIA HAS VACATED PREMISES AND PLTF. W/DISMISS ACTION W/PREJ. AGAINST HIM; IT WAS ACKNOWLDEGED THAT PLTF. WAS NOT GIVING UP A SEPARATE DAMAGE ACTION AGAINST ERIK GARCIA; WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 20-NOV-94; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
